original_query: select l_shipmode, sum(case when o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' or o_orderpriority = '2-HIGH' then 1 else 0 end) as high_line_count, sum(case when o_orderpriority <> '1-URGENT' and o_orderpriority <> '2-HIGH' then 1 else 0 end) as low_line_count from orders, lineitem where o_orderkey = l_orderkey and l_shipmode in ('REG AIR', 'AIR') and l_commitdate < l_receiptdate and l_shipdate < l_commitdate and l_receiptdate >= date '1995-01-01' and l_receiptdate < date '1995-01-01' + interval '1' year group by l_shipmode order by l_shipmode;
rewritten_query:
SELECT 
    l.l_shipmode,
    SUM(CASE WHEN o.o_orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT', '2-HIGH') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_line_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN o.o_orderpriority NOT IN ('1-URGENT', '2-HIGH') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS low_line_count
FROM 
    lineitem l
INNER JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
WHERE 
    l.l_shipmode IN ('REG AIR', 'AIR')
    AND l.l_commitdate < l.l_receiptdate
    AND l.l_shipdate < l.l_commitdate
    AND l.l_receiptdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
    AND l.l_receiptdate < DATE '1996-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    l.l_shipmode
ORDER BY 
    l.l_shipmode;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replace implicit JOIN with explicit INNER JOIN and use table aliases for clarity
Replace OR condition with IN clause in the CASE expression for high_line_count
Replace AND conditions with NOT IN clause in the CASE expression for low_line_count
